title: Master OEM Software License Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews automatically for successive 12-month periods unless either party gives 90 days' notice.
business_scope: Embedded UI rendering toolkit for enterprise collaboration endpoints.
financial_terms: USD 1.85 royalty per shipped hardware endpoint containing the licensed runtime.
standard_terms_alignment: Partial alignment; legacy indemnity and audit clauses are vendor-favored.
open_source_candidate: Potentially replaceable with LVGL plus internal integration effort.
risk_flags: Vendor-favored audit rights
Auto-renewal not actively monitored
No benchmark for price reduction

title: Settlement and Restated OEM Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews for one-year terms unless terminated on 120 days' prior written notice.
governing_paper: Mixed; settlement on mutually negotiated paper, base OEM on vendor paper
business_scope: Contact center call recording and workforce analytics modules bundled into enterprise suites.
financial_terms: Annual minimum of USD 250,000 credited against variable royalties tied to agent-seat deployments.
standard_terms_alignment: Moderate alignment after settlement amendment; data-use rights remain ambiguous.
open_source_candidate: No direct drop-in open source replacement; partial alternatives exist for analytics only.
risk_flags: Ambiguous affiliate use rights
Legacy settlement obligations survive termination
No documented owner in current operating team

title: Distribution Addendum No. 12
auto_renewal: No automatic renewal; extension requires written amendment.
business_scope: Redistribution rights for code analysis and compression libraries in appliance firmware images.
financial_terms: Quarterly fee of USD 42,000 covering up to 500,000 redistributed units.
standard_terms_alignment: Strong alignment; current security and compliance language incorporated.
open_source_candidate: Compression components may be replaceable with Zstandard-based stack.
risk_flags: Renewal action required before expiry
Unit cap may be exceeded by current shipment forecast

title: Evaluation Agreement for Core Code Library
auto_renewal: No renewal.
business_scope: Short-term evaluation of C++ networking and XML parsing library for prototype firmware.
financial_terms: No license fee during evaluation; production use prohibited absent separate agreement.
standard_terms_alignment: Low alignment; confidentiality and residuals clauses are non-standard.
open_source_candidate: Yes; Boost.Beast and pugixml cover most use cases.
risk_flags: Expired but artifacts may remain in internal repositories
Residual knowledge clause conflicts with preferred terms

title: Software License Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews automatically for two-year periods absent 60 days' notice.
business_scope: File packaging, archive inspection, and secure transfer utilities embedded in support workflows.
financial_terms: USD 96,000 annual subscription for up to 40 production servers and 100 internal users.
standard_terms_alignment: Partial alignment; uptime obligations absent, escrow language missing.
open_source_candidate: Possible phased replacement with 7-Zip, libarchive, and internal signing utilities.
risk_flags: No recent legal review
Vendor paper predates current cyber standards
Renewal may occur without stakeholder visibility

title: Amendment No. 9 to OEM-IN Software License Agreement
auto_renewal: Base agreement renews annually; amendment remains effective while base agreement remains active.
governing_paper: Mutual amendment to legacy vendor paper
business_scope: Speech recognition, command grammars, and language packs for endpoint voice control.
commercial_model: Royalty by enabled feature and language pack
financial_terms: USD 0.65 per enabled endpoint plus USD 0.08 per installed premium language pack.
standard_terms_alignment: Moderate alignment; AI output ownership clarified, audit rights still broad.
open_source_candidate: Partial replacement possible with Vosk or Whisper-class models, but embedded footprint is a concern.
risk_flags: Royalty reporting complexity
Broad audit right with 10-day notice
Export-control annex requires annual certification

title: Amendment No. 18 to Audio Codec Software License Agreement
auto_renewal: Extends automatically while covered products continue to ship and royalties are paid.
governing_paper: Vendor paper with Cisco compliance rider
business_scope: Patent and implementation rights for audio encode/decode functionality in collaboration devices.
financial_terms: Royalty tiers range from USD 0.11 to USD 0.24 per shipped device depending on volume band.
standard_terms_alignment: Partial alignment; termination for patent challenge is unfavorable.
open_source_candidate: No direct open source substitute for patent grant; implementation alone would not solve licensing need.
risk_flags: Business may confuse codec implementation with patent coverage
Quarterly reporting obligations are manual

title: Amendment No. 26 to Master Agreement
auto_renewal: Master term rolls forward annually unless non-renewed with 180 days' notice.
business_scope: Hosted analytics and case-routing platform supporting post-sales support operations.
financial_terms: USD 1.2M annual subscription; service credits apply if monthly availability falls below 99.9%.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; includes security exhibit, DPA, subprocessors, and business continuity terms.
open_source_candidate: Some workflow functions could shift to Camunda and OpenSearch, but migration cost is high.
risk_flags: Large spend concentration
Subprocessor list updates require operational monitoring

title: Amendment No. 2 to SolutionsPlus Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews for one-year terms unless terminated with 90 days' notice.
business_scope: Resale and support alignment for workforce optimization software sold with collaboration solutions.
financial_terms: Discount bands from 18% to 32% based on quarterly booked revenue thresholds.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; pricing and support appendices updated to current template.
open_source_candidate: No single equivalent; scheduling engine could be replaced piecemeal.
risk_flags: Channel margin assumptions may be outdated
Named support contacts no longer current

title: Amendment No. 3 to Software Agreement
auto_renewal: Renewal follows base agreement schedule.
business_scope: Revision of discount model, support obligations, and migration rights for legacy on-prem deployments.
financial_terms: 22% annual maintenance on perpetual licenses; migration credits available toward cloud SKUs.
standard_terms_alignment: Moderate alignment; support SLAs improved but liability cap remains asymmetric.
open_source_candidate: Limited; reporting and recording functions may have open components, but not full suite parity.
risk_flags: Base contract still uses outdated vendor liability cap
Perpetual-to-cloud conversion rights may be underused

title: Final Executed OEM Agreement
auto_renewal: Auto-renews yearly unless either party gives notice 30 days before the end of the current term.
business_scope: Embedded graphical UI controls, charting widgets, and device-side menu framework.
commercial_model: Perpetual OEM license plus annual maintenance
financial_terms: One-time license fee previously paid; ongoing 18% maintenance and optional feature royalties.
standard_terms_alignment: Low alignment; document predates current security, accessibility, and sourcing standards.
open_source_candidate: Yes, likely replaceable with Qt for MCUs or web-based rendering stack depending hardware profile.
risk_flags: Very old contract still active
Minimal cybersecurity language
Maintenance pricing lacks benchmark protections

title: Amendment No. 3 to SolutionsPlus Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews for two-year periods absent non-renewal notice delivered 120 days before term end.
business_scope: Resale of cloud-native contact center connectors, routing adapters, and reporting modules.
financial_terms: Cisco retains 27% of net end-customer subscription revenue on eligible SKUs.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; cloud security and branding rights are current.
open_source_candidate: Connectors could be custom-built, but operational support burden would increase.
risk_flags: Revenue share percentages may need refresh against current channel benchmarks

title: Commercial Terms Addendum to Core Supplier Base Agreement
auto_renewal: Auto-renews yearly unless a party elects non-renewal on 180 days' notice.
business_scope: Commercial framework for SaaS cloud services including hosting, support, DR, and compliance commitments.
financial_terms: Committed annual spend of USD 780,000 with overage fees for usage above contracted API volumes.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; includes security controls, audit reports, and data residency commitments.
open_source_candidate: Monitoring and logging layers could be internalized, but full platform replacement is not near-term.
risk_flags: API overage fees can spike without forecasting
Data residency annex may require update for new regions

title: Amendment No. 4 to SolutionsPlus Agreement
auto_renewal: Base agreement governs renewal; this amendment remains effective until superseded.
business_scope: Updated territories, enablement obligations, and marketing development fund terms.
financial_terms: Base discount of 24%; additional 3% MDF accrues on qualified regional campaigns.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment.
open_source_candidate: Not applicable; this is primarily a channel-commercial instrument.
risk_flags: MDF reconciliation requires manual finance follow-up

title: Amendment No. 4 to Application License Agreement for ISVs
auto_renewal: No automatic renewal; parties must negotiate continuation.
business_scope: Updated redistribution rights for software-development components bundled with build and test systems.
financial_terms: USD 310,000 annual fee for build farm, CI, and redistribution entitlements.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment with current procurement requirements.
open_source_candidate: Some static analysis functions may be replaced with LLVM-based open tooling.
risk_flags: Operational ownership not yet assigned
Activation checklist incomplete

title: Legacy Perpetual License and Support Agreement
auto_renewal: Support renews annually unless canceled 45 days before renewal.
business_scope: Protocol diagnostics, crash analysis, and symbol decoding tools used in engineering support.
financial_terms: 120 named-user seats with annual maintenance of USD 1,450 per seat.
standard_terms_alignment: Low alignment; limited security obligations and no modern privacy terms.
open_source_candidate: Some functionality may be replaced with Wireshark, LLDB, and internal tooling.
risk_flags: Named users likely outdated
No recent review despite continued spend

title: Hosted Services and Data Processing Addendum
auto_renewal: Renews for one-year terms unless either party provides 90 days' non-renewal notice.
business_scope: Telemetry analytics platform processing limited operational event data from collaboration services.
financial_terms: Base platform fee of USD 180,000 plus metered charges by million events processed.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; DPA and subprocessor terms are current.
open_source_candidate: Analytics stack could migrate to ClickHouse and Grafana with engineering investment.
risk_flags: Metered usage can exceed budget
Annual security report collection must be tracked

title: Royalty-Bearing Codec Integration Agreement
auto_renewal: Renews automatically for one-year periods while product family remains in active sale.
business_scope: Integration of low-latency audio enhancement algorithms for conference endpoint devices.
financial_terms: USD 0.19 royalty per active endpoint shipped, subject to annual true-up.
standard_terms_alignment: Moderate alignment; IP language acceptable, security terms minimal.
open_source_candidate: DSP alternatives exist, but quality and certification risk must be assessed.
risk_flags: True-up process is manual
Pricing has not been renegotiated in several years

title: Source Code Escrow and Maintenance Addendum
auto_renewal: Renews yearly unless terminated by either party with 60 days' written notice.
business_scope: Escrow deposits, release conditions, and maintenance continuity for embedded UI toolkit source code.
financial_terms: USD 74,000 annual fee covering escrow agent charges and update verification.
standard_terms_alignment: Strong alignment; escrow triggers and release rights are clearly negotiated.
open_source_candidate: Long-term replacement remains possible, but escrow lowers immediate continuity risk.
risk_flags: Escrow verification dependent on annual deposit discipline

title: Transition Services and Exit Assistance Amendment
auto_renewal: No renewal.
business_scope: Exit support, data export, migration assistance, and step-down services if SaaS stack is replaced.
financial_terms: Transition services billed at pre-agreed rate card with not-to-exceed cap of USD 240,000.
standard_terms_alignment: High alignment; designed as a modern transition rider.
open_source_candidate: Supports migration to internal or open-source alternatives by requiring export cooperation.
risk_flags: Synthetic scenario intended for AI testing only
